beIN SPORTS EN 2.desc_ar: ONE Championship returns on March 13, live from Bangkok’s Lumpinee Stadium in U.S. primetime. In the main event, lightweight Muay Thai contenders Sinsamut Klinmee and George Jarvis meet in a key bout with World Title implications. In the co-main event, Tye Ruotolo defends the ONE Welterweight Submission Grappling World Title against Pawel Jaworski. The card also features John Lineker, Supergirl, and Hyu Iwata.
